subcodes.first_line: O My Afnán! Thou hast attained unto Our presence and been illumined by the hearing of the verses. From the earliest days, for the sake of God, from the trumpet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: افنانی علیه بهائی بحضور فائز و باصغاء آیات منور از اول ایام لوجه الله از کوس
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort
